Package it.polimi.ingsw.network.server

Class Controller

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.Controller
public class Controller extends Object

    this method is used to put remove a student from characterCard 11 and put it in current player's dining hall and re
    void

    this method is used to remove a student from character card 1 and put it on a specified cloud
    boolean

    this method is used to check if a player with the specified nick already exists

    assignTeachers()
    assign teacher roles to different players depending on the number of students on each player's hall smNotify all players

    gameIsSet()
     
    GameBoard
    getBoard()
     
    CharacterCardBoard
    getCharacterCardBoard()
     
    Game
    getGame()
     
    void
    ignoreColor(StudentColor color)
    sets the specified color as ignoredColor for this turn
    void
    moveMotherNature(int movements)
    changes mother nature position and calls method to calculate majority on the island reached by mother nature called by client message MoveMother smNotify all player except current player of the new mother nature's position if only three island remain after merge or all towers of a certain color are placed players will be notified that the game is ended and winners will be calculated
    void
    moveStudentsDToH(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
    moves specified students form current player's dining hall to hall and smNotify all players except current This method is used to implement effect of character card 10
    void
    moveStudentsHToD(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
    move specified students from current player's hall to dining hall called by client message StudentsMovementsHToD Notify to other players the students added to current player's dining hall Notify to other players the students removed from current player's hall if mode is "expert" smNotify all student of the coins earned by the current player
    void
    moveStudentsHtoI(Integer island, ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
    move the specified students from current player's hall to specified island.
    void
    newRound()
    if this is the last round this method will smNotify all players and it will call gameResults.
    void
    notifyAvailableCC()
    this method is used to smNotify all player of the available character cards for this game
    void
    notifyUsedCharacterCard(int card)
    smNotify players except current of the character card used by the current players.
    void
    refillCard(int card, int studentsToRefill)
    refills the character card specified and smNotify all players
    void
    removeStudents(StudentColor color)
    remove 3 students of the specified color from all players' dining hall and put them back in the bag if lastStudentDrawn is set to true it will be set to false
    void
    resumeTurn()
    this method is used to smNotify the current player so that they resumes their turn
    void
    setAdditionalInfluencePoints()
    sets additionalInfluencePoints as true for the current player for this turn called by me client message CC2 if card id is 8
    void
    setBlockOnIsland(int island)
    place a block on the specified island called by client message CCG5
    void
    setBonusToPromotion()
    sets bonusToPromotion as true for the current player for this turn called by me client message CC2 if card id is 2
    void
    setChosenCloud(int cloud)
    sets the cloud chosen by the current player and smNotify all players except current called by client message Cloud
    void
    setDeck(String deck)
    set the deck of the current player and smNotify other players called by client message
    void
    setGameStatus(String mode, int numOfPlayers)
    sets game status
    void
    setIgnoreTower(int island)
     
    void
    setTower(String tower)
    sets the tower of the specified color for the current player and smNotify other players
    void
    setUsedSupportCard(int cardId)
    Checks if the specified support card is valid and smNotify all players.
    void
    switchCC7(ArrayList<StudentColor> studentToH, ArrayList<StudentColor> studentToCC7)
    this method is used to switch students between the current player's hall and character card 7
    Tower
    towerWithMoreTeachers()
    return the tower with the the most teachers connected. if the num of players is 4 the num of teachers connected to a tower is the sum of the number of teachers connected to players that shares that tower

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, smNotify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller(Server server)
      constructor
      Parameters:
      server - is used to set server attribute

  • Method Details

    • gameIsSet

      public boolean gameIsSet()
      Returns:
      true if game.numOfPlayers and game.mode have been set

    • addPlayerToGame

      public void addPlayerToGame(String nick)
      creates a new Player with the specified nick and adds it to the players list
      Parameters:
      nick - name of the new player

    • alreadyPresent

      public boolean alreadyPresent(String nick)
      this method is used to check if a player with the specified nick already exists
      Parameters:
      nick - nick we want to check if it is already present
      Returns:
      true if a player with the specified nick is already present.

    • getGame

      public Game getGame()

    • getBoard

      public GameBoard getBoard()

    • getCharacterCardBoard

      public CharacterCardBoard getCharacterCardBoard()

    • notifyAvailableCC

      public void notifyAvailableCC()
      this method is used to smNotify all player of the available character cards for this game

    • setGameStatus

      public void setGameStatus(String mode, int numOfPlayers)
      sets game status
      Parameters:
      mode - it could be "normal" or "expert"
      numOfPlayers - it is an int between 1 and 4

    • gameIsFull

      public boolean gameIsFull()

    • setTower

      public void setTower(String tower)
      sets the tower of the specified color for the current player and smNotify other players
      Parameters:
      tower - color of the tower to set

    • setDeck

      public void setDeck(String deck)
      set the deck of the current player and smNotify other players called by client message
      Parameters:
      deck - color of the deck to set

    • setUsedSupportCard

      public void setUsedSupportCard(int cardId)
      Checks if the specified support card is valid and smNotify all players. called by client message SupportCard if it is not valid only current player will be notified if the last support card has been used all players will be notified that this will be the last round
      Parameters:
      cardId - id of the support card

    • moveStudentsHtoI

      public void moveStudentsHtoI(Integer island, ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      move the specified students from current player's hall to specified island. called by client message StudentsMovementsHToI Notify to other players the new students on the island. Notify other players of the students removed from current player's hall
      Parameters:
      island - island to which move students
      students - students to move

    • moveStudentsHToD

      public void moveStudentsHToD(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      move specified students from current player's hall to dining hall called by client message StudentsMovementsHToD Notify to other players the students added to current player's dining hall Notify to other players the students removed from current player's hall if mode is "expert" smNotify all student of the coins earned by the current player
      Parameters:
      students - students to move

    • assignTeachers

      public void assignTeachers()
      assign teacher roles to different players depending on the number of students on each player's hall smNotify all players

    • moveMotherNature

      public void moveMotherNature(int movements)
      changes mother nature position and calls method to calculate majority on the island reached by mother nature called by client message MoveMother smNotify all player except current player of the new mother nature's position if only three island remain after merge or all towers of a certain color are placed players will be notified that the game is ended and winners will be calculated
      Parameters:
      movements - number of movements

    • setChosenCloud

      public void setChosenCloud(int cloud)
      sets the cloud chosen by the current player and smNotify all players except current called by client message Cloud
      Parameters:
      cloud - cloud chosen

    • newRound

      public void newRound()
      if this is the last round this method will smNotify all players and it will call gameResults. Otherwise it will call refill Clouds to start a new round

    • towerWithMoreTeachers

      public Tower towerWithMoreTeachers()
      return the tower with the the most teachers connected. if the num of players is 4 the num of teachers connected to a tower is the sum of the number of teachers connected to players that shares that tower
      Returns:
      the tower with more teachers

    • refillCard

      public void refillCard(int card, int studentsToRefill)
      refills the character card specified and smNotify all players
      Parameters:
      card - id of the card to refill
      studentsToRefill - number of students to refill

    • setBonusToPromotion

      public void setBonusToPromotion()
      sets bonusToPromotion as true for the current player for this turn called by me client message CC2 if card id is 2

    • setAdditionalInfluencePoints

      public void setAdditionalInfluencePoints()
      sets additionalInfluencePoints as true for the current player for this turn called by me client message CC2 if card id is 8

    • setBlockOnIsland

      public void setBlockOnIsland(int island)
      place a block on the specified island called by client message CCG5
      Parameters:
      island - index of the island

    • removeStudents

      public void removeStudents(StudentColor color)
      remove 3 students of the specified color from all players' dining hall and put them back in the bag if lastStudentDrawn is set to true it will be set to false
      Parameters:
      color - color of the students to remove

    • ignoreColor

      public void ignoreColor(StudentColor color)
      sets the specified color as ignoredColor for this turn
      Parameters:
      color - color tio set as ignored

    • additionalMotherMovements

      public void additionalMotherMovements(int movements)
      to move mother nature as effect of character card 4
      Parameters:
      movements - mother nature's movements

    • additionalMajority

      public void additionalMajority(int island)
      calculate majority as effect of character card 3
      Parameters:
      island - on which island calculate the majority

    • moveStudentsDToH

      public void moveStudentsDToH(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      moves specified students form current player's dining hall to hall and smNotify all players except current This method is used to implement effect of character card 10
      Parameters:
      students - students to move

    • notifyUsedCharacterCard

      public void notifyUsedCharacterCard(int card)
      smNotify players except current of the character card used by the current players. It also smNotify if the price is increased
      Parameters:
      card - id of the used card

    • resumeTurn

      public void resumeTurn()
      this method is used to smNotify the current player so that they resumes their turn

    • setIgnoreTower

      public void setIgnoreTower(int island)

    • addStudentToIsland

      public void addStudentToIsland(int island, StudentColor student)
      this method is used to remove a student from character card 1 and put it on a specified cloud
      Parameters:
      island - to which the student will be moved
      student - student to move

    • addStudentToD

      public void addStudentToD(StudentColor student)
      this method is used to put remove a student from characterCard 11 and put it in current player's dining hall and re
      Parameters:
      student - student to move

    • switchCC7

      public void switchCC7(ArrayList<StudentColor> studentToH, ArrayList<StudentColor> studentToCC7)
      this method is used to switch students between the current player's hall and character card 7
      Parameters:
      studentToH - student to move to hall form character card 7
      studentToCC7 - students to move to character card 7 form hall
